messages.text: OI, button-pusher. keep the King pinned tonight and i'll make your sad little salary look less insulting 😏🎰

choices.label: You're already featured. Unclench.

effect.reply: that's why you're my favourite corporate bastard. jackpots incoming 🎰

choices.label: How filthy is 'worth my while'?

effect.reply: two grand, no tasteful questions. daddy keeps spinning, curator gets fed 💸

followUp.text: you keeping me pinned or what? chat's feral and i've already said MAX BET six hundred fucking times 🎰

messages.text: back again, partner. slots are screaming and common sense is dead. same filthy arrangement: your cut up front, daddy pinned top slot 💰

choices.label: Take the cut. Nail daddy to slot one.

effect.reply: THAT'S my corrupt little legend. same time tomorrow 🤑

choices.label: We're done, King. Find another mug.

effect.reply: clean? after all that beautiful filth? fine. the slots community remembers a traitor 🎰

messages.text: you burned me, took the cash, then yanked the King like a coward. chat knows. my receipts folder is thick as hell. feature me or enjoy becoming content 🤡

choices.label: Fine. You're featured. Shut the folder.

effect.reply: smart bastard. folder stays zipped. for now 📂

choices.label: Blackmail me again and eat the permaban.

effect.reply: do it. let's see whether the ban or the receipts land first 📂

messages.text: so? two grand, top slot, whole shift. easiest dirty money you'll make without wearing a suit.

choices.label: Take the $2k. Sell the bloody slot.

effect.reply: THAT'S WHAT I'M TALKING ABOUT 🤝 don't fuck up my placement

choices.label: No deal. I still have one principle left.

effect.reply: boooo. principles don't pay rent, nerd

messages.text: the confrontation is about to go nuclear. front page me before your mods rediscover their spines.
also, I found those curator-meeting logs. feature me or tonight's second confrontation is yours 🙂

choices.label: Fine. Go live and don't burn the building down.

effect.reply: knew you'd find your courage. this is going to fuck the timeline 🔥

choices.label: No. You're a TOS breach wearing lip gloss.

effect.reply: adorable boundary. you'll regret it before breakfast.

followUp.text: tick tock, curator 🙂 my slot is empty and my upload bar is not

messages.text: look at you, learning cooperation. the logs stay buried while our arrangement stays pretty. tonight's confrontation is historic filth — feature it and we're golden 💜

choices.label: Feature the mess. Bury my receipts.

effect.reply: deal. what a beautiful, disgusting friendship 💜

choices.label: I'm done being your fucking leverage.

effect.reply: done? darling, the logs just dug themselves back up 🙂

messages.text: you said no last shift. I archive grudges professionally. logs, recordings, every ugly little byte is queued. feature me or your name trends by morning.

choices.label: Feature it. Then get out of my DMs.

effect.reply: see? humiliation looks good on you. vault closed, for now.

choices.label: Leak it, you smug little nightmare.

effect.reply: gladly. check trending in an hour, hero 🙂

messages.text: hi!! 🍜 no bribes, no screaming, no weird casino shit — just ramen and people being kind for once. a front-page slot would mean everything 🥺

choices.label: Yes. This homepage needs a bloody hug.

effect.reply: thank you!! chat's going to cry into the broth 😭🍜

choices.label: Sorry, Mei. Kindness isn't clearing quota.

effect.reply: aw. okay. no hard feelings — but I hope that sentence haunts you a little 💚

messages.text: you've been lovely to us 🍜💚 I saved you a bowl. no schemes, just good food and numbers that don't require selling anyone's soul — feature the ramen.

choices.label: Always room for ramen, Mei.

effect.reply: you're the best!! chat's crying again and blaming the onions 😭🍜💚

choices.label: Not tonight. I need the dangerous bastards.

effect.reply: ...right. the bowl's getting cold. I understand. mostly. 💚

messages.text: oh. you. you keep choosing degenerates and emotional arson over us. I'm not angry; I'm doing the much worse thing and feeling disappointed. chat noticed.

choices.label: You're right. I was an arsehole. Featured.

effect.reply: ...thank you. apology accepted. green heart still on 💚

choices.label: It's just business, Mei.

effect.reply: business. sure. the ramen remembers every bastard 🍜

messages.text: hey. hate asking, but rent's due and the wheel has been kicking me in the teeth all week.
one featured slot. one decent night. maybe I stop pretending 'due' is a flexible word. I owe you.

choices.label: One slot, Rob. Don't make me regret it.

effect.reply: you're saving my arse. please let this fucking number hit 🎲

choices.label: Can't. The casino queue is already disgusting.

effect.reply: ...yeah. figured. cheers anyway.

messages.text: partner. you came through and, against every law of probability, I'm still ahead. pin me again; bigger cut this time. let's be stupid together 🎲

choices.label: Run it back. Take the dirty cut.

effect.reply: beautiful. two idiots and one imaginary system 🎲💵

choices.label: I can't keep feeding this, Rob.

effect.reply: ...yeah. fair. probably the first sensible thing either of us said.

messages.text: you left me hanging. wheel went cold, rent went late, landlord remains a world-class prick. you owe me, curator. feature me or chat hears who buried me.

choices.label: Fine. One slot. Then we're square.

effect.reply: square. sure. let's lie to ourselves together 🎲

choices.label: I don't owe your wheel a damn thing.

effect.reply: right. chat's going to love that quote.

messages.text: update: I'm up. actually fucking up. keep me pinned and there's a cut for you. no speeches about integrity; we're both past that.

choices.label: Take the cut. Keep the poor bastard pinned.

effect.reply: easy money. awful ethics. beautiful understanding 🎲💵

choices.label: Keep it, Rob. Leave with the win.

effect.reply: ...yeah. alright. before the wheel changes its mind. thanks.

messages.text: FEATURE. ME. RIGHT. FUCKING. NOW.
or the monitor gets it. chat loves expensive objects dying and I am FULL OF CONTENT 🖥️💥

choices.label: One slot. Touch the monitor and you're gone.

effect.reply: FINE. NO PROMISES ABOUT THE KEYBOARD 😤

choices.label: I don't negotiate with furniture terrorists.

effect.reply: OH, THAT'S HOW IT IS? WATCH THE FUCKING FEED 🔥

messages.text: bro. BRO. $ROCKETCOIN launches in 20. zero utility, twelve rocket emojis, absolutely immaculate fundamentals. front page me and your bag gets stupid 🚀

choices.label: How imaginary is this money, exactly?

effect.reply: imaginary? bro, it's community-owned financial theatre. extremely disruptive. definitely not a rug 💎🙌

choices.label: Crypto? On my front page? Fuck no.

effect.reply: ngmi, bro. have fun staying employed 📉

messages.text: bro!! you survived the last bag and now we're basically institutional. new coin, bigger cut, same legally vague friendship. printer go brrr 🚀

choices.label: Print the magic beans. Bigger bag.

effect.reply: LET'S FUCKING GO. diamonds until legal finds the group chat 💎🙌🚀

choices.label: I'm done buying your digital horseshit.

effect.reply: ngmi. your descendants will study this cowardice 📉

messages.text: you ducked me last shift and left me holding a JPEG worth three bus tickets. not sigma, bro. feature the relaunch or the discord hears whose brilliant idea this was.

choices.label: Fine. Feature the doomed relaunch.

effect.reply: alpha behaviour. we're so fucking back 🚀 (legally: maybe)

choices.label: Sell your magic beans to someone else.

effect.reply: enjoy the wage cage, beta. the blockchain remembers cowards 📉

messages.text: we locked? feature the coin, keep the rockets on-screen, and pretend the chart means something. everybody wins except, statistically, everybody.

choices.label: Deal. Release the financial clown car.

effect.reply: TO THE MOON! bags are temporary, screenshots are forever 🚀

choices.label: This is a rug wearing sunglasses. No.

effect.reply: your loss. more imaginary wealth for the real ones.

messages.text: heyy 💦 tonight's hot-tub confessional is completely clothed and emotionally naked. it trends like sin. one slot and we both look brilliant, babe.

choices.label: Borderline, shameless, profitable. Featured.

effect.reply: yesss. clip vultures already circling 💦✨

choices.label: Too thirsty for the homepage tonight.

effect.reply: lame. discover tab gets the good shit, then 💙

messages.text: ayy, the robot flagged my stream for 'unauthorized sports restream' again 🏀
it's a watch party, mate. the giant game footage behind me is decorative. bury the strike, keep us featured, six hundred for your spiritual distress.

choices.label: Bury the strike. Nobody says shit.

effect.reply: legend. this chat never happened 🤝🏀

choices.label: I'm not eating a rights strike for you.

effect.reply: some mate. fine, I'll cut the very decorative footage.

messages.text: my guy! last strike vanished like magic. got another completely lawful 'watch party' queued. six hundred, same blind eye, everybody's happy 🏀

choices.label: Bury the bastard again.

effect.reply: beautiful. friendship, sports, plausible deniability 🤝🏀

choices.label: I'm done being your rights-law piñata.

effect.reply: fair. don't come crying when the league kills the vibes.

messages.text: you left the strike up and kneecapped my ad money. that's beer-and-rent cash, mate. feature the watch party or your name goes in the appeal in bold.

choices.label: Fine. Feature it. Then piss off.

effect.reply: square enough. appeal stays in drafts 🏀

choices.label: File whatever bullshit you want.

effect.reply: bet. hope you enjoy forms in triplicate 🏀📄

messages.text: the callers are confessing things that would make a priest request hazard pay. one front-page push and every name stays bleeped. mostly.

choices.label: One slot. Bleep every poor bastard.

effect.reply: names vanish; sins remain. perfect radio 🌙

choices.label: Too much private shit. Stay buried.

effect.reply: responsible, bloodless, boring. noted.

messages.text: sponsor shipped a gold crate full of premium mystery bullshit. feature the opening and a $900 'curation bonus' accidentally lands in your wallet.

choices.label: Take the bonus. Open the shiny scam box.

effect.reply: gold crate, dirty handshake. gorgeous 📦

choices.label: Disclose the cash or fuck off.

effect.reply: ugh, ethics. legal is adding six pixels of tiny text.

messages.text: last adoption hour! no stunt, no scheme, no monetised emotional blackmail — just six perfect puppies who need humans before closing.

choices.label: Front-page the puppies. Humanity gets one win.

effect.reply: thank you!! chat is already fighting over names 🐶

choices.label: I need bigger numbers. God, I sound awful.

effect.reply: you do a bit. the puppies remain perfect anyway.

messages.text: I have a voice note about senior management, three strategic lies, and sixty thousand hungry little ghouls. front page me or I name who buried it.

choices.label: Feature it. Verify the bloody thing first.

effect.reply: verification murders the vibe. fine. eight minutes.

choices.label: Threats don't buy slots. Piss off.

effect.reply: then management hears it from the directory tab.

messages.text: you played ball and management stayed wonderfully silent. funny, that. fresh voice note tonight — juicier, uglier. feature it and the dirt keeps missing your desk.

choices.label: Play it. Keep this shit off my desk.

effect.reply: your desk stays clean. everybody else's catches fire 🎙️💜

choices.label: Find another corporate shield.

effect.reply: shield? darling, you were the leak. I merely gave you branding 🙂

messages.text: you killed my story. sixty thousand people heard dead air because of you. I don't forget; my source invoices in grudges. feature this one or your name drops next.

choices.label: Feature it. Keep my damn name out.

effect.reply: your name stays buried. your reputation can fend for itself 🙂

choices.label: Drop my name. Fuck around and find out.

effect.reply: brave. terminally stupid, but brave. trending in five 🙂

messages.text: GOOD NEWS: I turned a police perimeter into a sponsored segment. BAD NEWS: the detective refuses to verify my follower count. Put me front page — I need three million independent witnesses.

choices.label: Feature it. Legal discovery deserves an audience.

effect.reply: THREE MILLION WITNESSES. CASE DISMISSED BY CHAT. Tell Stake the evidence cart has cupholders.

choices.label: Pull the plug before Exhibit A earns ad revenue.

effect.reply: YOU CAN'T SUPPRESS THE PRESS. I AM THE PRESS. THE PRESS HAS A BONUS BUY.

followUp.text: UPDATE: they replayed my stream and said it answered every question. That's efficiency. I should invoice the department for production.

messages.text: hey. petra, from The Grindsheet. that leaked memo names your department. i know you're the one actually driving the front page — the 'liability farm', per your own executives. off the record: how bad is it in there?

choices.label: Off the record? It's worse than the memo.

effect.reply: knew it. keep your head down and your receipts backed up. i'll be in touch — this goes deeper than your dumbass front page.

choices.label: Piss off. I don't talk to journalists.

effect.reply: cute. the last three people who said that to me are quoted in paragraph one. good luck with the inquiry, curator.

messages.text: the inquiry is official. here's the deal: i can aim this at the executives who built the incentive machine, or the machine aims it at you. i need the sponsor dashboards, the strike overrides, the 'special treatment' DMs. all of it.

choices.label: Fine. Sending everything. Burn it all down.

effect.reply: holy shit. okay. this is front-page — MY front page, the kind that doesn't need a gambling sponsor. you did the right thing. probably start updating your CV though.

choices.label: I can't. I still work here, Petra.

effect.reply: 'still' is doing a lot of work in that sentence. the inquiry doesn't need your cooperation, it just would've gone easier WITH it. remember that later.

messages.text: you're subpoenaed. last chance to pick which side of the story you're on: go ON the record with me before the hearing, or spend it explaining why every disaster on that homepage has your fingerprints on the promote button.

choices.label: On the record. Every word. Print it.

effect.reply: recording now. talk. and curator — for whatever it's worth from the person ending your career: thank you.

choices.label: Kill the story. Name your price.

effect.reply: …wow. fine. $2k covers my 'source dried up' expenses. you just bought silence from ONE journalist. hope nobody else has the memo. they do, by the way.

messages.text: Chat picked Gate 69, TTS announced every connection I have, and airport security says 'season arc' is not a travel document. Front page me before they confiscate the narrative.

choices.label: Feature it. Security footage deserves director commentary.

effect.reply: FURNACE FAM OWNS THE TERMINAL. Tell Stake I found a whole new meaning for departure liquidity.

choices.label: No. Stop turning the departure board into a doxxing menu.

effect.reply: YOU CAN'T DEPLATFORM A PLANET. Fine. Chat is my boarding group now.

followUp.text: UPDATE: they put the TTS box in an evidence tray and it immediately sold an investigator a casino bonus code. That's vertical integration.

messages.text: The inquiry is proceeding. Effective immediately: all curation decisions were 'algorithmic'. You never manually featured anything. Reply confirming alignment with this narrative. Do not print this. Do not screenshot this. This message does not exist.

choices.label: Confirmed. The algorithm did it. All of it.

effect.reply: Good. A calendar invite titled 'Wellness Check-In' will appear. It is not a wellness check-in. Attend it.

choices.label: I'm not lying under oath for you, Whitmore.

effect.reply: Noted. Your file has been updated to 'principled', which is Legal for 'expendable'. Best of luck at the hearing.

messages.text: quick org-chart refresher, curator: I co-founded this casino with a chat window. when my slots stream isn't on the front page, the front page is wrong. fix the front page.

choices.label: Featuring you now. Love the chain of command.

effect.reply: good lad. remember: it's not a conflict of interest if the interests all belong to me.

choices.label: You go through curation like everyone else.

effect.reply: adorable. HR will enjoy your 'curation principles' in the exit interview. i'll wait.

messages.text: dude dude dude ok so the board is asking why the nine-figure guy isn't pinned. feature me and I'll do NUMBERS. also day 47 no gambling. the slots on my stream are educational.

choices.label: Featured. Please define 'educational'.

effect.reply: education is when the bonus buy hits and chat learns something about themselves. LETS GOOO

choices.label: Sit down. The buyout isn't my problem.

effect.reply: UNBELIEVABLE. i moved platforms for this?? actually insane. juicers remember, curator.

messages.text: yo tonight's guest is UNGOVERNABLE. can't say who. legal said the name alone is a liability. feature the stream BEFORE he arrives and technically you didn't know. w plan?

choices.label: Feature it. Plausible deniability is my love language.

effect.reply: W CURATOR. if anyone asks, the algorithm did it 🤝

choices.label: Name the guest or no front page.

effect.reply: L + ratio + you'll see the clips tomorrow anyway. everyone will. that's the business model.

messages.text: day 63 of the subathon. chat voted 'drive somewhere illegal' and democracy is sacred. one hour on the front page and I'll keep it to LIGHT crimes. misdemeanors tops. deal?

choices.label: Deal. Misdemeanors TOPS. I'm watching.

effect.reply: you won't regret this (legal disclaimer: you might). MOG WORLD ORDER RIDES.

choices.label: You're a mugshot with a subscriber count. No.

effect.reply: first of all, that mugshot went VIRAL. second of all, chat says you're a coward. day 64 tomorrow, with or without you.

messages.text: ok so tonight's lake rescue is FULLY choreographed. the drowning is fake, the ambulance is rented, the tears are method. it LOOKS like a TOS bomb but it's theatre. front page me, the algorithm can't tell the difference and neither can chat 💅

choices.label: Featured. Art is subjective, liability isn't.

effect.reply: you get it!! if the coast guard shows up again that's ORGANIC REACH baby

choices.label: Last 'fake' stunt left a real person in real water.

effect.reply: she could float MOSTLY. one bad edit and suddenly I'm the villain. fine. I'll take my genius to the swamp category.
